source_excerpt: Net operating revenues were $47,941 million in 2025, compared to $47,061 million in 2024, an increase of $880 million, or 2%.
notes: Every material figure in the claim (2%, $880 million, $47,941 million, fiscal year 2025) matches the source text exactly. The attribution to The Coca-Cola Company's 2025 fiscal year is consistent with the resolved filing.
